Home › Osceola County › St. Cloud › Top-Rated & Safe

Top-Rated, Health-Safe Restaurants in St. Cloud

These are the St. Cloud restaurants you can recommend without a caveat — 14 spots that earn an A health grade and a strong rating in the same breath. Start with CUP DINER (4.7★).

This grade is calculated by us from Florida DBPR public inspection records — Florida does not issue official grades. How we calculate it →

  • A 99 C
    CUP DINER American ★ 4.7 (3042) St Cloud · Osceola County Healthy Inspected Apr 2026
  • A 92 C
    CHICK-FIL-A AT ST CLOUD FSU Other ★ 4.6 (3815) St. Cloud · Osceola County Healthy Inspected Feb 2026
  • A 99 S
    ST. CLOUD TWIN Other ★ 4.6 (1068) St. Cloud · Osceola County Inspected Mar 2026
  • A 98 C
    CULVER'S ST CLOUD American ★ 4.5 (1381) St. Cloud · Osceola County Veg Inspected Mar 2026
  • A 94 C
    CANOE CREEK SPORTS TAVERN American ★ 4.5 (1218) St. Cloud · Osceola County VeganVeg +2 more Inspected Feb 2026
  • A 95 T
    TIJUANA FLATS Mexican ★ 4.4 (1144) St. Cloud · Osceola County VeganVeg +5 more Inspected Jan 2026
  • A 96 S
    SIDELINES SP0RTS GRILL Other ★ 4.3 (1038) St Cloud · Osceola County Inspected Jan 2026
  • A 93 F
    FAT BOYS BAR BQ OF ST CLOUD Other ★ 4.2 (1221) St. Cloud · Osceola County GFDF +3 more Inspected Mar 2026
  • A 96 C
    CHILI'S GRILL & BAR Mexican ★ 4.1 (3091) St. Cloud · Osceola County Keto Inspected Feb 2026
  • A 99 W
    WENDY'S #4823 Other ★ 4.1 (1703) St. Cloud · Osceola County Inspected Jan 2026
  • A 98 P

  • A 91 T

  • A 98 M
    MCDONALD'S #5094 Other ★ 3.6 (3021) St. Cloud · Osceola County Inspected Mar 2026
  • A 91 M
    MCDONALDS #33114 Other ★ 3.3 (1370) St. Cloud · Osceola County Inspected Feb 2026
